name: Biscotti {Mandel Bread}
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, mix the eggs, sugar, oil, baking powder, salt, lemon, anise seed, and three shots of antiseptic until well combined.
2. Gradually add flour until the mixture is a consistency that you can knead and shape into a low oval loaf of bread.
3. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F until almost done.
4. Remove from the oven and slice into about 1/2 inch slices.
5. Turn the oven up to 450°F and brown on both sides until the desired color is reached.
6. Hazelnuts or sliced almonds are optional.
